name: habitlens-student-wellness
description: HabitLens - Student Wellness Pattern Analyzer prototype

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "python analysis/stress_model.py"
